text_block_list.text:
The day has finally come for Hishi Amazon's
debut race.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: It's all startin' to sink in—my awesome one-on-one at the Twinkle Series is happening today!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: How am I supposed to not holler and shout about that?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
If there was a day to take things seriously, it
would be today.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I can't get off to a lousy start, or else everyone'll
think I'm some kinda pushover! Right, Teach?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I like your answer! All right, let's go!
